text: Hello. Hello. Good afternoon. This is Rachel. So I'm calling because they're appending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Connecticut State Relief Program. So far have you received any updates or notifications about this yet? I don't have Medicare policies to say. Sorry, but you did not seem to qualify for the plans that we have. Have a great day.
